source_binding.detail: This launch contract binds the first local trusted-LAN swarm to the canonical local Apple contributor source while keeping the wider cluster posture explicit.

runtime_env.name: PSION_PROGRAM_MANIFEST_ID
runtime_env.detail: Bind the local swarm lane to the root cross-provider pretraining program.

runtime_env.name: PSION_PROGRAM_MANIFEST_DIGEST
runtime_env.detail: Carry the exact program-manifest digest into the local swarm lane.

runtime_env.name: PSION_RUN_ID
runtime_env.detail: Stable run id for the first local trusted-LAN swarm.

runtime_env.name: PSION_EXECUTION_CLASS
runtime_env.detail: Carry the validated contributor execution class through the local swarm lane.

runtime_env.name: PSION_RUN_ROOT
runtime_env.detail: Shared artifact-root binding in the provider-neutral launch contract.

runtime_env.name: PSION_LAUNCH_ROOT
runtime_env.detail: Shared artifact-root binding in the provider-neutral launch contract.

runtime_env.name: PSION_CHECKPOINT_ROOT
runtime_env.detail: Shared artifact-root binding in the provider-neutral launch contract.

runtime_env.name: PSION_METRICS_ROOT
runtime_env.detail: Shared artifact-root binding in the provider-neutral launch contract.

runtime_env.name: PSION_VISUALIZATION_ROOT
runtime_env.detail: Shared artifact-root binding in the provider-neutral launch contract.

runtime_env.name: PSION_FINAL_ROOT
runtime_env.detail: Shared artifact-root binding in the provider-neutral launch contract.

runtime_env.name: PSION_BUNDLE_DIR
runtime_env.detail: Local operator-bundle directory retained by the first swarm launcher.

startup_plan.detail: The local swarm startup path remains a local operator bundle that reuses the committed topology contract and workflow plan digests `144481e413d4892b375e7b5f2fd8d24b7d98094806506b0e00a34262a2a9aa07` and `573b6df00266981819b8cb08654ac6e6f727418cb5a46768255e8ea27b2f2821`.

finalizer_plan.detail: The first local swarm lane still closes through a local closeout report rather than a remote host finalizer, but the expected inputs and output are now explicit in the shared launch contract.

projected_steps.detail: Provider-specific local launcher that materializes the operator bundle and trusted-LAN manifest.
Local closeout report path for the first swarm lane.

claim_boundary: This launch contract proves the first local trusted-LAN swarm can be projected from the same provider-neutral runtime envelope as the Google and RunPod lanes. It does not claim dense-rank closure, public swarm discovery, or same-job mixed-backend dense training.
